steps: Bring stock to a boil with lemongrass and galangal/ginger.
Add prawns and mushrooms and reduce heat to a gentle simmer.
When prawns begin turning pink, add chilies and kaffir lime leaves.
Stir in lime juice and fish sauce; simmer briefly and serve hot.
tips: Adjust heat with chilies and balance sour (lime) and salty (fish sauce) at the end; avoid overcooking shrimp.
